dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 6374 IH: To prohibit the admission of aliens to the United States for 10 years, and for other purposes.
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. Gosar (for himself and Mr. Crane) introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on the Judiciary

form.official-title: To prohibit the admission of aliens to the United States for 10 years, and for other purposes.

section.header: 10-year ban on admission of aliens to the United States
section.text: Beginning on the date of enactment of this Act, and ending on the date that is 10 years after such date of enactment, no alien may be admitted to the United States.
